item.title: Intel Stock Hits All-Time Highs: Is the Turnaround Priced In?
item.description: Intel has delivered a true blowout quarter, but after a massive rally, the smarter play may be waiting for the next pullback rather than chasing.

item.title: ServiceNow's 18% Drop: AI Fears Continue, But May Be Overblown
item.description: ServiceNow got battered after its latest earnings. The reaction suggests that fear is driving investors as results continue to hold up.

item.title: Poll Reveals: Which Stores That No Longer Exist Do People Miss Most? [2026]
item.description: A 2026 poll of 3,000+ Americans aged 45+ reveals the stores people miss most—from Blockbuster to Fry’s Electronics—and what modern retail has lost alo...

item.title: STMicronelectronics Sends Industrial Chips Into Overdrive
item.description: STMicroelectronics is well-positioned for a global supercycle driven by AI and extending to all corners of the semiconductor ecosystem.

item.title: Sonoco Stock Drops as Inflation Hits Q1 Results
item.description: Sonoco stock falls after a Q1 earnings miss. Inflation, flat EPS, and rising debt pressure growth, but AI-driven demand and a strong dividend offer su...
